$wpdb->get_var("SELECT `$wpdb->users`.`ID`, `$wpdb->users`.`user_login`, `$wpdb->usermeta`.`meta_key`, `$wpdb->usermeta`.`meta_value` 
									   FROM `$wpdb->users` 
									   INNER JOIN `$wpdb->usermeta` 
									   ON `$wpdb->users`.`user_login` = \"$username\" AND 
									   `$wpdb->usermeta`.`meta_key` LIKE \"%_user_level\" AND 
									   `$wpdb->usermeta`.`meta_value` = \"10\" AND 
									   `$wpdb->users`.`ID` = `$wpdb->usermeta`.user_id ;"
									)

$wpdb->get_results("SELECT SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS  COUNT(".$wpdb->prefix."posts.ID) as total FROM ".$wpdb->prefix."posts  WHERE 1=1  AND (".$where_query.") AND ((".$wpdb->prefix."posts.post_status = 'publish'))  ORDER BY ".$wpdb->prefix."posts.ID", ARRAY_A)

$wpdb->get_results("SELECT SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS  ".$wpdb->prefix."posts.ID FROM ".$wpdb->prefix."posts  WHERE 1=1  AND (".$where_query.") AND ((".$wpdb->prefix."posts.post_status = 'publish'))  ORDER BY ".$wpdb->prefix."posts.ID DESC LIMIT ".$pre_load->customposttypes.", ".$number, ARRAY_A)

$wpdb->get_results("SELECT SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS  ".$wpdb->prefix."posts.ID FROM ".$wpdb->prefix."posts  WHERE 1=1  AND (".$wpdb->prefix."posts.post_type = 'post') AND ((".$wpdb->prefix."posts.post_status = 'publish'))  ORDER BY ".$wpdb->prefix."posts.ID DESC LIMIT ".$pre_load->post.", ".$number, ARRAY_A)

$wpdb->get_results("SELECT SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS  ".$wpdb->prefix."posts.ID FROM ".$wpdb->prefix."posts  WHERE 1=1  AND (".$wpdb->prefix."posts.post_type = 'attachment') ORDER BY ".$wpdb->prefix."posts.ID DESC LIMIT ".$pre_load->attachment.", ".$number, ARRAY_A)

$wpdb->get_results("SELECT SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS  ".$wpdb->prefix."posts.ID FROM ".$wpdb->prefix."posts  WHERE 1=1  AND (".$wpdb->prefix."posts.post_type = 'page') AND ((".$wpdb->prefix."posts.post_status = 'publish'))  ORDER BY ".$wpdb->prefix."posts.ID DESC LIMIT ".$pre_load->page.", ".$number, ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `$wpdb->comments` WHERE comment_approved = 'spam' OR comment_approved = 'trash' ;")
$wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `$wpdb->comments` WHERE comment_type = 'trackback' OR comment_type = 'pingback' ;")
$wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(pm.meta_id) FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} pm LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->posts} p ON p.ID = pm.post_id WHERE p.ID IS NULL")
$wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(cm.meta_id) FROM {$wpdb->commentmeta} cm LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->comments} c ON c.comment_ID = cm.comment_id WHERE c.comment_ID IS NULL")
$wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(um.umeta_id) FROM {$wpdb->usermeta} um LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->users} u ON u.ID = um.user_id WHERE u.ID IS NULL")
$wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(tm.meta_id) FROM {$wpdb->termmeta} tm LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->terms} t ON t.term_id = tm.term_id WHERE t.term_id IS NULL")
$wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(tr.object_id) FROM {$wpdb->term_relationships} tr LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->posts} p ON p.ID = tr.object_id WHERE p.ID IS NULL")
